title: agrimonia eupatoria f. canescens
intro: Agrimonia eupatoria f. canescens, also known as grey agrimony, is a subspecies of the agrimony plant (Agrimonia eupatoria) native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of grey agrimony include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Grey agrimony can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of fever, diarrhea, and menstrual cramps.
